title: Beyond MC
description: A large library of mods that makes Minecraft feel new again. Vanilla+
body:
# Beyond MC

![Deep Dark with Beyond Minecraft logo.](https://i.imgur.com/aWwttEe.gif)

Hey there! Thanks for checking out **Beyond MC**, a project I’ve been working on for a few months.

## How to set up

Getting started is simple: download the modpack, increase the memory allocation to atleast **8,192 MB**, make sure you have installed, and are using Java 21 (JDK21) or newer, then just tweak anything to your liking!
